name: Workday
description: Monitor Workday HCM/HR platform for employee access, workforce data, and audit logging compliance

credentialFields.label: Tenant Name
credentialFields.helpText: Your Workday tenant name (from your Workday URL)

credentialFields.label: Tenant ID
credentialFields.helpText: Workday tenant ID (found in API Client settings)

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: OAuth2 API Client ID from Workday

credentialFields.label: Refresh Token
credentialFields.helpText: OAuth2 Refresh Token (generated during API Client setup)

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Workday worker records and access for HR compliance and employee verification

checks.name: Access Review Log
checks.description: Monitors Workday activity logs for user access events and system audit compliance
